community.eyebrow: When the rage seems too big
community.title: Talk to parents who wondered if this was normal too
community.body: You'll know which signs prompted other parents to call a professional and which ones resolved on their own. We are there with you daily too.

course.title: The Beyond Hitting course will help you gauge when aggression needs outside support
course.body: You'll learn what's within the normal range and what signals it's time to bring in a professional.
